breakthroughs: Completed first full self-introduction in Mandarin
Self-corrected shì vs shui error on immediate re-drill
sessions.notes: First session. Academic style learner. Skipped tone drills — text-only format unsuitable for audio-dependent tone practice. Strong pattern matching and sentence construction. One vocabulary error (shui for shì) self-corrected quickly.

breakthroughs: First session answering in hanzi characters
Correctly used 我是美国人 from memory without prompt
focus_next_session: Review numbers — san (3), wu (5), shi (10) had errors
Ordinal numbers: 第一、第二、第三
Expand pronouns: wǒmen (we), nǐmen (you plural), tāmen (they)
sessions.notes: Session 2. Learner switched to hanzi answers — good initiative. Three number errors (san/wu/shi_10) but self-corrected. Introduced ordinal 第 as new grammar pattern. Hanzi recognition strong for characters seen. Tone differentiation remains a text-mode challenge.

milestones.milestone: Profile created — beginning Mandarin journey from A1
First hanzi answers produced in session
